name: k2hr3-api
description: K2HR3 REST API is K2hdkc based Resource and Roles and policy Rules

scripts.help:
echo 'command list:
    npm run build
    npm run build:all
    npm run build:copyfiles
    npm run build:files
    npm run clean
    npm run start
    npm run start:prod
    npm run start:production
    npm run start:prod:dbg
    npm run start:prod:debug
    npm run start:prod:debug:break
    npm run start:prod:debug:nobreak
    npm run start:dev
    npm run start:develop
    npm run start:dev:dbg
    npm run start:dev:debug
    npm run start:dev:debug:break
    npm run start:dev:debug:nobreak
    npm run start:watcher:prod
    npm run start:watcher:production
    npm run start:watcher:dev
    npm run start:watcher:develop
    npm run start:watcher:dbg
    npm run start:watcher:debug
    npm run start:watcher:debug:break
    npm run start:watcher:debug:nobreak

    npm run start:watcher:oneshot:dev

    npm run start:watcher:oneshot:dbg
    npm run start:watcher:oneshot:debug
    npm run start:watcher:oneshot:debug:break
    npm run start:watcher:oneshot:debug:nobreak
    npm run stop
    npm run stop:watcher
    npm run test
    npm run test:lint
    npm run test:lint:all
    npm run test:lint:files
    npm run test:checktypes
    npm run test:cover
    npm run test:auto
    npm run test:auto:all{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:version{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:usertokens{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:list{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:resource{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:policy{:dbg}

    npm run test:auto:extdata{:dbg}
    npm run test:auto:watcher{:dbg}

    npm run test:manual
    npm run test:manual:apis:version_get
    npm run test:manual:apis:usertoken_postput
    npm run test:manual:apis:usertoken_gethead
    npm run test:manual:apis:policy_postput
    npm run test:manual:apis:policy_gethead

    npm run test:manual:apis:resource_delete

    npm run test:manual:apis:role_gethead
    npm run test:manual:apis:role_delete

    npm run test:manual:apis:tenant_gethead
    npm run test:manual:apis:tenant_delete
    npm run test:manual:apis:service_postput

    npm run test:manual:apis:service_delete
    npm run test:manual:apis:acr_postput
    npm run test:manual:apis:acr_get

    npm run test:manual:apis:userdata_get

    npm run test:manual:templengine:async
'
scripts.build:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build' && npm run build:all && echo '-> [DONE] build
'
scripts.build:all:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:all' && tsc && npm run build:copyfiles && echo '-> [DONE] build:all
'
scripts.build:copyfiles:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:copyfiles' && if [ -d dist/src/bin ]; then mkdir -p dist/src/bin >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && cp src/bin/run.sh dist/src/bin/run.sh  >/dev/null 2>&1 && chmod +x dist/src/bin/run.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '-> [DONE] build:copyfiles
'
scripts.build:files: export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:files <file>' && tsc --target ES2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --rootDir . --outDir dist --strict --esModuleInterop --forceConsistentCasingInFileNames --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --allowJs false
scripts.clean:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] clean' && if [ -d dist ]; then rm -rf dist/* >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && echo '-> [DONE] clean
'
scripts.start:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start' && npm run start:production && echo '-> [DONE] start
'
scripts.start:prod:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod' && npm run start:production && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod
'
scripts.start:production:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:production' && dist/src/bin/run.sh -bg --production && echo '-> [DONE] start:production
'
scripts.start:prod:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:dbg' && npm run start:prod:debug && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:dbg
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug' && npm run start:prod:debug:break && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:break:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug:break' && dist/src/bin/run.sh --production --debug --debuglevel dbg && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug:break
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:nobreak:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug:nobreak' && dist/src/bin/run.sh --production --debug-nobrk --debuglevel dbg && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug:nobreak
'

scripts.test:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test' && npm run test:cover && echo '-> [DONE] test
'
scripts.test:lint:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:lint' && npm run test:lint:all && echo '-> [DONE] test:lint
'
scripts.test:lint:all:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:lint:all' && eslint --ext .ts src/lib/*.ts src/app.ts src/bin/www.ts src/bin/watcher.ts src/routes/*.ts tests/*.ts && echo '-> [DONE] test:lint:all
'
scripts.test:checktypes:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:checktype' && tsc --noEmit && echo '-> [DONE] test:checktype
'
scripts.test:cover:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:cover' && nyc --reporter=lcov --reporter=text npm run test:auto:all && echo '-> [DONE] test:cover
'
scripts.test:auto:all:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:auto:all' && npm run test:lint && tests/test.sh all && npm run test:auto:templengine && npm run test:auto:templengine:async && echo '-> [DONE] test:auto:all
'
scripts.test:auto:all:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:auto:all:dbg' && npm run test:lint && tests/test.sh -d dbg all && echo '-> [DONE] test:all:dbg
'

scripts.test:manual:
echo 'Manual test : npm run test:manual:*
      npm run test:manual:apis:version_get
      npm run test:manual:apis:usertoken_postput
      npm run test:manual:apis:usertoken_gethead
      npm run test:manual:apis:policy_postput

      npm run test:manual:apis:list_gethead
      npm run test:manual:apis:userdata_get
      npm run test:manual:apis:extdata_get
      npm run test:manual:apis:allusertenant_get
      npm run test:manual:apis:k2hr3keys_get
      npm run test:manual:load:k2hdkcdata:auto
      npm run test:manual:load:k2hdkcdata:local
      npm run test:manual:templengine
      npm run test:manual:templengine:async
'
